title: Crate doc says 'same public API as stoa-sieve' — internal name
description: lib.rs crate-level doc comment: 'This crate provides the same public API as stoa-sieve'. stoa-sieve is an internal monorepo crate name that OSS users have no context for. This will appear on docs.rs and confuse every reader. Remove the cross-reference entirely or replace with a plain description.
